prompt: Our community wants to add Italian to the R-Ladies website. What's involved in setting up a whole new language?
assertions: Register the language in config/_default/languages.yaml (with languageName and weight)
Copy i18n/en.yaml to i18n/it.yaml and translate the values, keeping the keys in English
Add a 'Read in' badge label in data/read_in_lang.yaml
Mentions the disableLanguages production gate (not live until its code is removed)
